title: Garlicky German Beef Flank Steak Bauernfristuck
description: A classic German-inspired dish featuring garlicky flavors and tender beef, perfect for a gluten-free meal.
instructions: Season the flank steak with salt, black pepper, and garlic.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the flank steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches a safe internal temperature of 135°F for medium-rare.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Sprinkle with fresh parsley and serve.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as sauerkraut or roasted vegetables.
